sections.markdown:
- Activity: New Shoes
- Started: 2025-06-12 17:53
- Distance: 10.9 km
- Moving time: 59:08
- Elapsed time: 59:50
- Elevation gain: 187.8 m
- Average heart rate: 174 bpm
- Max heart rate: 187 bpm
- Average watts: 217.2 W
- Average speed: 11.1 km/h

- Apple Health recorded `4` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `173.7 bpm`, ranging from `166.2` to `177.7 bpm`.
- First-half average HR was `171.1 bpm` and second-half average HR was `176.3 bpm` (+5.3 bpm), which shows a modest late rise in aerobic cost.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `171.3 spm`, with a working range of `113.8` to `176.6 spm` after excluding `2` start-stop outliers below `100 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `171.7 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `168.9 spm` (-2.7 spm), which looks mechanically stable.

- Strava moving pace averaged `5:25 /km` across `10.901 km` in `59:08` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `5:13 /km` and second-half pace was `5:38 /km` (+25 s/km), so pace faded meaningfully in the back half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `174.0 bpm` average and `187 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `169.8 bpm` in the first half and `177.5 bpm` in the second (+7.7 bpm), which shows a modest late rise in aerobic cost.

- Moving time was `59:08` out of `59:50` elapsed (98.8%), which kept stoppage cost negligible.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `11` stop segments and `1.2%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `199.6 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `0.8 m` and `70.6 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `62.6 m` in the first half and `137.0 m` in the second, so most of the climbing landed later.
